description: Analyze ledger postings to find cost changes, then create projects/activities
endpoints: GET /ledger/posting — params: dateFrom, dateTo, accountNumberFrom, accountNumberTo, count
common_errors: Must include dateFrom and dateTo on /ledger/posting queries
Circuit breaker triggers at 10 errors — be precise with API calls
tips: PRECISE APPROACH: 1) GET /ledger/posting?dateFrom=2026-01-01&dateTo=2026-01-31&accountNumberFrom=4000&accountNumberTo=9999&count=1000 for Jan. 2) GET /ledger/posting?dateFrom=2026-02-01&dateTo=2026-02-28&accountNumberFrom=4000&accountNumberTo=9999&count=1000 for Feb. MUST do TWO separate queries, NOT one big range. 3) Sum amountGross by account.number for each month. 4) Find top 3 accounts with largest INCREASE (Feb total - Jan total). 5) For each account, call create_project with isInternal=true, name=EXACT account name from Tripletex (e.g. 'Lønn til ansatte', not just 'Lønn'). 6) For each project, create an activity via generic_api_call: POST /activity with body {"name": "EXACT SAME NAME AS THE PROJECT", "activityType": "GENERAL_ACTIVITY"}. Do NOT use /project/projectActivity (returns 500). Create the activity as GENERAL_ACTIVITY via /activity instead. 7) If the prompt asks for employee assignment, use create_employee or find existing employee. Do ALL ledger reads with generic_api_call. Do NOT retry failed calls.
